title: Kxffies TP
description: A No-Cheat Enabled Teleport Mod (made to work with Xaero's Minimap)
body:
# Kxffies TP
Hey, thanks for checking out my mod!

No more having to open your world to LAN for cheats on your cheat-less world just to teleport to a location with your minimap mod (or other reasons)

This mod now allows the use of teleporting to a set of coordinates without having to enable cheats in your world, as some minimap mods have a teleport function for waypoints and more. You can now just replace the command that those mods use with my command and be able to teleport without enabling cheats. No more tempation, no more having to open your world to LAN.

I noticed the "No OP Port" (on curseforge) mod did this same fix, but was stuck at 1.20.1 and didnt seem to be continued any further, so I made this. If popular enough and others would like older versions/newer version to be used, please join my [discord](https://discord.gg/sx34u9ExYU) and let me know!

## How to use?
This mod was specifically made for Xaeros Minimap, as I did not want to enable cheats in order to teleport to waypoints. In Xaeros settings, there is a way to change the default teleport command. Just add a "k" after the "/" and before "tp".
If you are having errors, try replacing "{name}" with your player name. In order for selectors to work like @s or @p, you must have OP or permission level 2, which you can only use with cheats enabled. Otherwise, you have to put your username.

You can also use it in chat - "/ktp (your username) x y z"

This should work in both client-side and server-side, as in my testing it did but I did not thoroughly test it.

## Reports 
If you have any issues or any suggestions, please join my [discord](https://discord.gg/sx34u9ExYU) and create a post!
